title: Radha Krishna
desc: Radha and Krishna's love transcends eras, emotions, epitomizing eternal love.

title: Sri Renuka Yellamma
desc: Goddess Parvati incarnates as two girls-Renuka, born into royalty, and Yellamma, born in a village-to shield humanity from evil forces and restore balance in their troubled worlds.

title: Love Story
desc: The film shows inter-caste love between Revanth and Mounika in quest of dreams.

title: Paape Maa Jeevanajyothi
desc: Jyothi finds joy in her daughter's birth, but her world collapses when the child is kidnapped, pushing her into a desperate, emotional search.

title: Ninnu Kori
desc: Betrayed and cast out, Chandrakala battles to prove her innocence and earn love. Can she reclaim her place and rewrite her destiny?

title: Brahma Mudi
desc: A mother tries to arrange marriages for her three talented daughters with suitors from a wealthy family, but unexpected twists turn the matchmaking plan into a series of surprises.

title: Paluke Bangaramayenaa
desc: Swaragini battles low confidence due to her speech impediment, while Abhishek guides and supports her, helping her discover her voice and inner strength.

title: Saptapadi
desc: A traditional tale explores seven sacred vows of marriage, following a couple as they navigate responsibilities and emotional challenges in pursuit of lasting harmony and trust.

title: Vaarasuralu
desc: Once a united family breaks apart due to ambition and blame. Years later, a daughter's heartfelt promise becomes the only hope of healing old wounds and bringing everyone home again.

title: Podarillu
desc: A boy and his love confront family expectations and social values. They show responsible behavior, resolve problems, and model respect for a harmonious life.

title: Chinni
desc: After tragedy tears Chinni from her loved ones, she rebuilds her life as Madhumitha, facing new challenges and unexpected turns on a journey of strength and rediscovery.

title: Nindu Manasulu
desc: Raju, a brave fighter against injustice, is framed by Seshu. He rescues Susheela, uncovers the truth, battles villains, reforms, and ultimately finds love and acceptance in his colony.

title: Nuvvu Leka Nenu Lenu
desc: Radha Krishna and Krishna Veni argue a lot. Their fathers are friends and business partners who would like the couple to marry each other.

title: Illu Illalu Pillalu
desc: Vishwa and Dheeraj clash over their feelings for Prema. Later, Narmada encourages Dheeraj to make coffee for Prema when she requests it, adding some tension to the situation.

title: Karthika Deepam-Nava Vasantham
desc: Dark-skinned Deepa faces harsh societal judgment after marrying Dr. Karthik, bravely fighting prejudice while trying to build a life filled with dignity and love.

title: Intinti Ramayanam
desc: Set in Karimnagar, Telangana, Ramulu's close-knit family begins to unravel when an unexpected crisis strikes, causing suspicion and tension to grow among them.
